channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (0143-9530-01)
item.description: Ifosfamide, Injection, 50 mg/1 mL (NDC 0143-9530-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-12 Company: Hikma Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Additional lots will be available in the June – July 2026 timeframe. Product will be made available as it is released.

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (0143-9531-01)
item.description: Ifosfamide, Injection, 50 mg/1 mL (NDC 0143-9531-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-12 Company: Hikma Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Additional lots will be available in the July 2026 timeframe. Product will be made available as it is released.

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (0338-3991-01)
item.description: IFEX, Injection, 1 g/20 mL (NDC 0338-3991-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-12 Company: Baxter Healthcare

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (0338-3993-01)
item.description: IFEX, Injection, 3 g/60 mL (NDC 0338-3993-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-12 Company: Baxter Healthcare Estimated recovery in October.

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (10019-925-01)
item.description: Ifosfamide, Injection, 1 g/20 mL (NDC 10019-925-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-12 Company: Baxter Healthcare Estimated recovery by the end of August.

item.description: Ifosfamide, Injection, 3 g/60 mL (NDC 10019-926-02) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-12 Company: Baxter Healthcare Estimated recovery by the end of August.
